categories.name: Science & Technology
categories.description: Prompts related to scientific concepts, technological explanations, and technical knowledge
example_prompts: Explain the concept of quantum entanglement in simple terms
Describe how blockchain technology works
What is the difference between machine learning and deep learning?

categories.name: Programming
categories.description: Prompts requesting code implementation, algorithm design, and software development tasks
example_prompts: Write a Python function that implements the A* pathfinding algorithm
Implement a binary search tree in C++
Create a REST API endpoint for user authentication

categories.name: Creative Writing
categories.description: Prompts requesting creative content including stories, poems, and imaginative compositions
example_prompts: Compose a haiku about the changing of seasons
Write a short story that begins with a specific sentence
Write a poem about the beauty of the night sky

categories.name: Mathematics
categories.description: Prompts involving mathematical derivations, proofs, and quantitative explanations
example_prompts: Derive the mathematical formula for the gradient
Explain the Monty Hall problem
Prove the Pythagorean theorem using algebra

categories.name: Economics & Business
categories.description: Prompts about economic theory, business strategy, market analysis, and entrepreneurship
example_prompts: Analyze the economic impact of AI on the global labor market
Explain supply and demand with practical examples
Discuss the concept of opportunity cost

categories.name: Translation & Linguistics
categories.description: Prompts involving language translation, linguistic analysis, and cross-cultural communication
example_prompts: Translate a proverb into multiple languages
Explain the grammatical differences between two languages
Analyze the etymology of a specific word

categories.name: Computer Networking
categories.description: Prompts about network protocols, architecture, security, and infrastructure
example_prompts: Compare TCP and UDP protocols
Explain how DNS resolution works
Describe the OSI model layers

categories.name: Database Design
categories.description: Prompts about database architecture, schema design, query optimization, and data modeling
example_prompts: Design a database schema for a social media platform
Write an optimized SQL query for reporting
Explain the differences between SQL and NoSQL databases

categories.name: Persuasive Writing
categories.description: Prompts requesting argumentative essays, opinion pieces, and persuasive compositions
example_prompts: Write a persuasive essay arguing for a four-day work week
Argue for or against a specific public policy
Write an opinion piece on a controversial topic

categories.name: Software Architecture
categories.description: Prompts about system design, architectural patterns, scalability, and distributed systems
example_prompts: Design a RESTful API for an e-commerce platform
Design a microservices communication pattern
Design a load balancing strategy for high availability

categories.name: Ethics & Philosophy
categories.description: Prompts about ethical reasoning, philosophical arguments, moral dilemmas, and value systems
example_prompts: Discuss the ethical implications of gene editing
Analyze the trolley problem from multiple philosophical perspectives
Discuss the ethics of AI consciousness

categories.name: Psychology
categories.description: Prompts about psychological concepts, mental health, cognitive processes, and behavioral science
example_prompts: Explain cognitive biases and list common examples
Explain the concept of flow state
Describe how memory formation works in the brain

categories.name: DevOps
categories.description: Prompts about CI/CD, containerization, orchestration, infrastructure as code, and disaster recovery
example_prompts: Design a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions
Create a disaster recovery plan for cloud-native apps
Explain Docker vs Kubernetes use cases

categories.name: Software Engineering
categories.description: Prompts about engineering practices, design patterns, code review, and development methodologies
example_prompts: Compare microservices and monolithic architectures
Compare REST APIs and GraphQL
Design an OOP class hierarchy for a video game

categories.name: Cultural Studies
categories.description: Prompts about cultural traditions, social practices, historical contexts, and cross-cultural analysis
example_prompts: Describe the cultural significance of tea ceremonies
Explain the historical context of a cultural practice
Compare wedding traditions across different cultures

categories.name: Professional Writing
categories.description: Prompts requesting business documents, professional emails, cover letters, and formal communications
example_prompts: Write a professional email declining a job offer
Draft a cover letter for a software engineering position
Write a project proposal for a new initiative

categories.name: Marketing
categories.description: Prompts about product descriptions, advertising copy, branding, and market positioning
example_prompts: Write a product description for wireless headphones
Create a marketing tagline for a fitness app
Draft a social media campaign strategy

categories.name: Finance
categories.description: Prompts about financial markets, investment analysis, personal finance, and economic indicators
example_prompts: Explain how the stock market works
Compare different investment strategies
Describe how inflation affects personal savings

categories.name: Political Science
categories.description: Prompts about governance systems, political theory, civic processes, and policy analysis
example_prompts: Compare democracy and authoritarianism
Explain the separation of powers
Analyze the impact of lobbying on legislation

categories.name: Business & Entrepreneurship
categories.description: Prompts about starting businesses, growth strategies, management practices, and innovation
example_prompts: Write a guide on how to start a small business
Describe the lean startup methodology
Explain how to create a business plan
